429 M0610B_STG_3_4_ULCR_WDTH_NUM M0610B_STG_3_4_ULCR_WDTH_NUM M0610B Unhealed Stage 3-4 Pressure Ulcer Width Number CHAR 4 The data in this column contains the width of the largest pressure ulcer (widest width of the same pressure ulcer, side-to-side perpendicular (90-degree angle) to length). discontinued 9/30/2018
